This package contains mutable and immutable primitive list API.

This package contains implementations of the mutable primitive list interfaces.

This package contains implementations of the mutable primitive stack interfaces.

    Methods in org.eclipse.collections.api.ordered.primitive that return OrderedByteIterable
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    OrderedByteIterable
    OrderedByteIterable.reject(BytePredicate predicate)
     
    default OrderedByteIterable
    OrderedByteIterable.rejectWithIndex(ByteIntPredicate predicate)
    Returns a new OrderedByteIterable excluding all elements with corresponding indexes matching the specified predicate.
    OrderedByteIterable
    OrderedByteIterable.select(BytePredicate predicate)
     
    default OrderedByteIterable
    OrderedByteIterable.selectWithIndex(ByteIntPredicate predicate)
    Returns a new OrderedByteIterable including all elements with corresponding indexes matching the specified predicate.

    class

    ByteArrayList is similar to FastList, and is memory-optimized for byte primitives.

    A synchronized view of a MutableByteList.
